headline: IBM Lawsuit Over Black Executive Layoffs Tests Governance And ESG Story
summary: IBM (NYSE:IBM) is facing a lawsuit that accuses the company of racially discriminatory layoffs targeting Black executives. The suit alleges a pattern of race based terminations tied to shifts in regulatory and compliance priorities. The case raises questions about IBM's diversity, equity, and inclusion practices and its internal governance controls. For investors following NYSE:IBM as a large enterprise technology and services provider, this case adds a social and governance angle to the...
